diagnosticQuestions.prompt: What does one candle usually show?
choices: Open, high, low, and close for that time window
diagnosticQuestions.hint: Think of one snapshot of a race: start, best moment, worst moment, finish.

teachSlides.title: Picture one day of trading
teachSlides.body: Imagine a stick of candy. The thick part is where most trading happened between open and close. The thin sticks show the highest and lowest prices that day.

masteryQuestions.prompt: The thick part of the candle is mostly about:
masteryQuestions.explanation: The body connects open and close; wicks show the extremes.
